sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the segmentation, I notice there are only 7 nodes now (ids 0-6), and the left dark square is missing! Previously there were two dark squares. The left one disappeared. This is a key observation.
Current state:
- Left green box: at cols 9-11, center=W (white) - controllable by arrow keys
- Right green box: at cols 30-32, center=c (dark gray)
- Left dark square: GONE (was at cols 11-15)
- Right dark square: still at cols 44-48, interior=W
The left dark square disappeared when I moved the left green box out of it! This suggests the dark square is "anchored" to the green box, or the green box "carries" the dark square with it.
Wait, actually looking at the image, I can see the dark square is still there on the left panel. But the segmentation doesn't show it as a separate node. Let me check the ascii to see what's happening.
Actually, looking more carefully at the image, the dark square appears to be at the same position (inside the left panel), but the green box is now to the LEFT of it. The green box is partially outside the left panel.
But the segmentation shows the left panel (id=1, color=w) has boundary [[21, 9], [21, 23]]-[32, 10]. This is strange - the boundary seems wrong. Let me look at the ascii.
Actually, I think what happened is: the left green box moved LEFT and is now overlapping the left edge of the left panel. The dark square is still there but may have merged with the panel or changed color.
Let me focus on the key finding: clicking on a green box makes it controllable. The left green box is now controllable and has a white center. I need to move it back into the dark square.
Looking at the image, the left green box is at cols 9-11 (approximately). The dark square interior is at cols 12-14 (approximately). I need to move RIGHT to get the green box back into the dark square.
Let me try moving RIGHT to get the green box back into the dark square.

sections.content:

- Clicking on a green box makes it controllable AND toggles the other green box's center color
- Left green box is now controllable (was clicked last)

- Need to move it back RIGHT into the dark square

# It's at cols 9-11, dark square interior is at cols 12-14

</tool_call>
